issues.description: PowerBoost target must filter for {Fish-Man} type. Current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' lacks type restriction.

Action 'Rest' is incorrect for 'set up to 1 of your {Fish-Man} type Characters as active'. Should use 'PlayFromHand' or similar to set active, not Rest (which exhausts). Clarify intent: does 'set as active' mean switch to active position?
Rest target must filter for {Fish-Man} type Characters. Current scope lacks type restriction.
Second effect (trigger:'Trigger' with RestOpponentCharacter) has no basis in card text. Card text contains only two sequential actions both on Counter trigger. This effect should be removed.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your {Fish-Man} type Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle. Then, set up to 1 of your {Fish-Man} type Characters as active.
